chapter_title.en: Chapter on Trade, Its Etiquettes, Virtues, and Jurisprudence

text: 3735 - وَ قَالَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ يَقُولُ : "اَلسَّمَاحُ وَجْهٌ مِنَ اَلرَّبَاحِ" قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ "ذَلِكَ لِرَجُلٍ يُوصِيهِ وَ مَعَهُ سِلْعَةٌ يَبِيعُهَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3735 - Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
I heard the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) say, "Leniency is a means of profit."
Imam (as) then said: "This applies to a man who is advised while he has goods to sell."
